---
---

Hi, I'm Quy—an Applied Data Scientist. I'm from Hanoi, Vietnam 🇻🇳. Currently living in Singapore 🇸🇬.

I blog about [RecSys](/#category=recsys), [ML](/#category=machine%20learning), [Productivity](/#category=productivity) and other random things. You can find some of my side projects [here](/projects.html).

I used to teach a RecSys course for practitioners at [FullStackDataScience](https://fullstackdatascience.com/courses/igds).

I build [Calens](https://www.calens.dev)—a Chrome extension for Google Calendar Analytics.
